# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: servicePrincipal
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2015-11-01
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
      roleDefinitionName: 'Contributor'
      principalId: '{servicePrincipalObjectId}'

  - name: servicePrincipal
    type: Microsoft.Identity/permissions/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2020-06-01-preview
    properties:
      permissions:
        - operations: [Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write]
          notActions: []
          dataActions: []

  - name: servicePrincipal
    type: Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces/authorizationRules
    apiVersion: 2017-04-01
    properties:
      resourceGroupName: '{resourceGroupName}'
      namespaceName: '{namespaceName}'
      authorizationRuleName: 'serviceprincipal'
